title: Woman with mental illness dies after jumping into well; mother survives by clinging to rope in Kannur
summary: A 42-year-old woman died after jumping into a well with her mother, who survived. The mother is recovering. Police suspect a mental health incident.

title: Kasaragod cops seize 'Helen of Sparta's car after 17-km chase; influencer booked for drunk driving
summary: An Instagram influencer, 'Helen of Sparta', was arrested for drink-driving after a 17km police chase on National Highway 66. Her vehicle was stopped at 2 am and she was found to be well over the legal alcohol limit.

title: Samastha Kannur Vice President Umarkoya Thangal passes away
summary: Umarkoya Thangal, a prominent religious leader and educator from Kannur, passed away at 75 after an illness, having significantly contributed to religious and educational activities.
